description: All 18 integration tests in editor_handlers.rs exercise helper functions directly without going through Tauri IPC layer. No test invokes any #[tauri::command] function to verify argument name matching between TS-side invoke() payload shapes and Rust-side parameter names (FIND-001 example: issuedAt field mismatch would go undetected).

evidence.snippet: All 18 tests import crate::editor functions directly, none test IPC layer
